# claude_agent (Data Source)

Look up an existing Claude agent by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_agent" "existing" {
  id = "agent_01HqR2k7vXbZ9mNpL3wYcT8f"
}

data "claude_environment" "existing" {
  id = "env_01abc"
}

output "agent_model" {
  value = data.claude_agent.existing.model.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Agent identifier.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) Archive timestamp, or null.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `mcp_servers` (String) MCP servers (JSON).
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata.
- `model` (Attributes) Model configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--model))
- `multiagent` (String) Multi-agent coordinator (JSON).
- `name` (String) Agent name.
- `skills` (String) Skills (JSON).
- `system` (String) System prompt.
- `tools` (String) Tools (JSON).
- `type` (String) Object type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
- `version` (Number) Current version.

<a id="nestedatt--model"></a>
### Nested Schema for `model`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `speed` (String)
